prompt:
Vertical 4:5 portrait social-media poster, GTA Vice City aesthetic for the Muha Members Giveaway. The REFERENCE image is the locked typography / palette / Muha logo / layout anchor — reproduce its: ornate gold filigree Muha 'M' crest logo at top center, warm-cream stone-textured headline letters with reddish-orange tint and strong red glow halo behind/beneath, red banner subtitle, all-red GTA Vice City palette, vertical centering of the text block. The headline text and background scene are different — see below.

VERTICAL LAYOUT: text-and-logo block VERTICALLY CENTERED. Muha crest near top-third mark, headline at vertical center, subtitle banner just below center. Lower portion shows the background scene.

PALETTE — LOCKED: dominant CRIMSON / SCARLET RED (#B81020 / #E0202C / #FF2F3F) with warm orange-red accents, deep black, wet-asphalt charcoal, warm gold accents on the Muha crest. ABSOLUTELY NO pink, NO magenta, NO teal, NO cyan, NO purple.

HEADER TYPOGRAPHY — match the reference exactly:
  • Bold blocky sans-serif letterforms with thick uniform strokes (heavy GTA-style display face, NOT chrome, NOT silver).
  • Letter FACE: warm cream / pale peach with subtle reddish-orange tint, faint stone / concrete / weathered-marble TEXTURE — slightly grainy and organic, like sunbaked sandstone.
  • Letter OUTLINE: thin dark maroon / dried-blood red.
  • GLOW: strong warm red-orange glow halo radiating from behind and beneath every letter, like backlit by red neon.
  • DEPTH: 3D extruded shadow underneath each letter in deep maroon.
  • POSTURE: slight forward italic skew (~5-8°).
  • All caps, perfectly horizontally centered, two stacked lines: line 1 'EARN', line 2 '200 POINTS'. The phrase is exactly 'EARN 200 POINTS'.

SUBTITLE: same red banner-bar styling as the reference, all caps, perfectly horizontally centered directly below the headline, reading 'REPOST THE MAIN VIDEO'. Red bar background, white-stroked text.

MUHA LOGO: ornate gold filigree Muha 'M' crest at top center, exact match to the reference.

BACKGROUND — RED DODGE CHALLENGER IN MOTION, UNIQUE COMPOSITION: a bright crimson Dodge Challenger SRT speeding head-on down a Vice City strip at night, captured from a low front-three-quarter dynamic angle. The car's headlights blaze warm-white; red neon storefront signs blur past on both sides as long horizontal LIGHT TRAILS (long-exposure streaks of red, white, and warm orange — like a slow-shutter Miami-strip night drive). Palm fronds whip past at the edges blurred into directional streaks. Wet rain-slicked black asphalt reflects the streaking red lights underneath the car. A distant Miami skyline glows warm red-orange at the horizon line. The car is the most legible element; the surroundings smear with speed and energy. NO stacks of cash, NO money piles, NO static parked Challenger — this composition is DYNAMIC and IN MOTION, distinct from the static Challenger-on-money posters used elsewhere in the campaign.

Retain the reference's grain / halation / cinematic finish. Sharp focus on headline, subtitle, Muha logo, and the Challenger's front-end; background motion-blurred with shallow depth-of-field. Photorealistic editorial movie poster. No additional text beyond what's specified.
